lymphedema.title: Lymphedema
lymphedema.question: Are you experiencing unexplained swelling in your arms or legs?
lymphedema.s1: Noticeable swelling in one or both limbs
lymphedema.s3: Skin that feels firm or changes texture
lymphedema.s4: Swelling that worsens after activity or by end of day

lipedema.title: Lipedema
lipedema.question: Do your legs feel heavy and painful, disproportionate to the rest of your body?
lipedema.s1: Legs that look large and feel painful to touch
lipedema.s2: Easy bruising with no clear cause
lipedema.s3: Swelling that does not improve with diet or exercise
lipedema.s4: Feet look normal — only legs and hips are affected

home.ctaTitle: Ready to speak with a specialist?
home.ctaSubtitle: Our clinic provides expert diagnosis and personalised treatment for lymphedema and lipedema. You deserve answers and a care plan that works.

contact.title: Book a Consultation
contact.subtitle: The fastest way to reach us is via WhatsApp. Send us a message and our team will get back to you to confirm your appointment.
contact.ctaHint: Tap to open WhatsApp — no app download needed on desktop
contact.step1: Tap the WhatsApp button and briefly describe your concern or the condition you would like assessed.
contact.step2: Our team will reply with available appointment times and confirm your preferred date and location.
contact.step3: Attend your consultation at Genesis Healthcare or HealthHub. Bring any previous reports or scans if you have them.
contact.moreInfoPost: for more information about Dr. Riza and his practice.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: A partnership between Herald Medical and General Trading and Dubai Vascular — bringing world-class vascular, lymphedema, and lipedema care to the UAE.
about.ctaSubtitle: Dr. Ibrahim Riza and Nurse Nielsen are here to help. Book a consultation and take the first step toward a proper diagnosis and care plan.
about.heraldDesc1: Herald Medical and General Trading is the clinical home behind swellinglegs.ae — a UAE-based medical trading and services company committed to specialist healthcare. Herald brings together expert practitioners, modern facilities, and patient-centred values to address conditions that are often overlooked or misdiagnosed.
about.heraldDesc2: Through its partnership with Dubai Vascular, Herald is at the forefront of lymphedema and lipedema care in the region, providing diagnosis, treatment, education, and ongoing patient support.
about.vascularDesc1: Dubai Vascular is the specialist practice of Dr. Ibrahim Riza — one of Dubai's most experienced vascular and endovascular surgeons. With over 22 years of international practice and 5,000+ procedures performed, Dubai Vascular stands for technical excellence and internationally recognised outcomes.
about.vascularDesc2: The practice focuses on endovascular aortic procedures, carotid interventions, deep vein thrombosis, varicose veins, and vascular complications. Its outcomes in endovascular aortic aneurysm repair are published in the UK National Vascular Registry.
about.drBio: Dr. Riza completed his surgical and vascular training at the Royal Liverpool University Hospital and South Manchester University Hospital — two of the UK's leading vascular centres. He holds Fellowship with the Royal College of Surgeons and a Certificate of Completion of Specialist Training (CCST-UK). Before moving to Dubai, he served as Clinical Director of Vascular Services at Pennine Acute Hospitals NHS Trust in Greater Manchester, where he led the development of vascular services and the commissioning of a state-of-the-art Hybrid OR.
about.drQuote: Once you've met Dr. Riza, there's no looking back. His professionalism, compassion, and expertise are evident from the very first visit.
about.timeline1d: Graduated from Mangalore University with MBBS qualification
about.timeline2d: Vascular surgical training at Royal Liverpool University Hospital and South Manchester University Hospital — two of the UK's leading vascular centres.
about.timeline3d: Clinical Director of Vascular Services, Pennine Acute Hospitals NHS Trust, Greater Manchester — led merger of Greater Manchester vascular services and commissioned a state-of-the-art Hybrid OR.
about.timeline4d: Joined Mediclinic Hospitals Group Dubai as Consultant Vascular & Endovascular Surgeon.
about.timeline5d: Now seeing patients at Genesis Healthcare (Dubai Science Park) and HealthHub Festival City. Elected Chairman, Scientific Committee of the Emirates Vascular Society.
about.nurseRole: Peripheral Vascular Lab (PVR) Specialist & Lymphedema / Lipedema Specialist
about.nurseBio1: Nielsen is a cornerstone of the clinical team — a highly skilled specialist nurse whose expertise spans both the peripheral vascular lab and the diagnosis and management of lymphedema and lipedema. Patients consistently highlight her warmth, thoroughness, and ability to explain complex conditions clearly and compassionately.
about.nurseBio2: Her specialist knowledge in lymphedema and lipedema makes her uniquely positioned to support patients through assessment, compression therapy guidance, treatment education, and ongoing care — working hand-in-hand with Dr. Ibrahim Riza to deliver a truly integrated patient experience.
about.nurseQuote: Doctor Ibrahim is very accommodating — he explains everything clearly. Nurse Nielsen is so helpful as well! Kudos for both of them.
about.value1d: Over two decades of specialist vascular and endovascular expertise across the UK and UAE.
about.value2d: Surgical fellowship with the Royal College of Surgeons; trained at world-leading centres.
about.value3d: Compassionate care that keeps patients informed, calm, and confident at every step.
about.value4d: Published outcomes in the UK National Vascular Registry; Chairman, Emirates Vascular Society.

modal.compareSub: Both cause swelling and are often confused. An accurate diagnosis matters because treatments differ significantly.
modal.compareStillA: Book a consultation and speak with a specialist.
